---
name: Spec bug
about: A contradiction, ambiguity, or error in a specification or schema
title: "[BP-0X] "
labels: spec-bug
---

## Where

<!-- Spec (e.g. BP-03), section (e.g. §5.2), and the exact sentence(s). For
schemas: file and JSON pointer. -->

## What kind

- [ ] Contradiction (within a spec, between specs, or spec vs schema — say which)
- [ ] Ambiguity (two reasonable implementers would build different things)
- [ ] Error (factually wrong, broken example, wrong cross-reference)

## The problem

<!-- What the text says vs what it should say or what it conflicts with. -->

## Proposed wording (optional)

<!-- If you can, propose the fix. Errata land as PATCH. -->

> Security-sensitive findings (defeating the visibility law, forget audit,
> gates, or S2/S3 walls): do **not** file here — contact the editor privately.
